---
title: "Session 13"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "4 Feb, 2026"
output: html_notebook
---
## Create Box Plot and Violin Plot from infectivity data

```{r}
infect <- read.table("../Project_files/data/infect.txt",
                     header = FALSE, sep = "\t",
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

colnames(infect) <- c("sample_id", "nef_ratio", "cell_line")
```

```{r}
rna_files <- list.files("../Project_files/data", pattern = "\\.htseq$", full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
serinc5_id <- "ENSG00000164300"

serinc5_list <- lapply(rna_files, function(f) {

  df <- read.table(
    f,
    header = FALSE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    fill = TRUE
  )

  df <- df[, 1:2]
  colnames(df) <- c("gene_id", "count")

  df <- df[!grepl("^__", df$gene_id), ]

  ser <- df[df$gene_id == serinc5_id, ]

  data.frame(
    sample_id = sub("\\.htseq$", "", basename(f)),  # clean SRR ID
    SERINC5_RPM = if (nrow(ser) == 0) NA else ser$count,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})

serinc5_df <- do.call(rbind, serinc5_list)
```

```{r}
plot_df <- merge(infect, serinc5_df, by = "sample_id")
```

```{r}
plot_df <- plot_df[!is.na(plot_df$SERINC5_RPM), ]

```

```{r}
plot_df$SERINC5_group <- cut(
  plot_df$SERINC5_RPM,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 5, 20, Inf),
  labels = c("Low (0–5)", "Medium (5–20)", "High (>20)")
)
```


```{r}
plot_df$infect_group
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

p_violin <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = infect_group, y = SERINC5_RPM)) +
  geom_violin(
    aes(fill = infect_group),
    trim = FALSE,
    alpha = 0.8,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "low" = "red",
      "medium" = "green3",
      "high" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Nef infectivity group",
    y = "SERINC5 expression (RPM)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 35)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_violin)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

p_violin <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = infect_group, y = SERINC5_RPM)) +
  geom_violin(
    aes(fill = infect_group),
    trim = FALSE,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "low" = "red",
      "medium" = "green3",
      "high" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Nef infectivity group",
    y = "SERINC5 expression (RPM)"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 500)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_violin)

```
